name: Seed ASR 2.0
author: moshoujingli
description: Real-time streaming transcription via Volcengine Seed ASR 2.0. Custom binary WebSocket protocol with optional boosting tables for domain vocabulary. Credentials stored in macOS Keychain.

descriptions.de: Echtzeit-Streaming-Transkription via Volcengine Seed ASR 2.0. Eigenes binäres WebSocket-Protokoll mit optionalen Boosting-Tabellen für Fachvokabular. Anmeldedaten werden im macOS Schlüsselbund gespeichert.
descriptions.zh-Hans: 通过火山引擎 Seed ASR 2.0 进行实时流式语音识别。自定义二进制 WebSocket 协议，可选热词表用于领域词汇。凭证存储在 macOS Keychain 中。
